title: Piercing Prompts (concept-as-practice)
html:
Piercing Prompts (concept-as-practice)

Yahir's practice of using off-axis questions to surface character — the practical, repeatable instantiation of asking the right question. The named version arrives in April 2025, but the unnamed practice is documented across 3+ years of weird, deliberately destabilizing conversation prompts.

Chronology of the practice

  • 2022-04-16 — 2022 04 16 what are must have seasoning no salt or pepper — "What is fair criteria to be waterboarded?" / "Walk-out song in the UFC, replicate?" — the earliest unnamed instances, 3 years before the practice gets a name
  • 2022-08-28 — 2022 08 28 ask what book she reads — softer prompt variant
  • 2022-12-16 — 2022 12 16 james cassidy be afraid to be silent — "don't be afraid to be silent" — the meta-practice (let the awkward gap do the piercing)
  • 2023-01-25 — 2023 01 25 would you rather — would-you-rather as scaffolding
  • 2023-02-01 — 2023 02 01 pre determined stances / 2023 02 01 pre determined and re adjusted if necessary stances — pre-loading the prompts
  • 2023-03-29 — 2023 03 29 plans for spring break — three "form an opinion on…" tasks (AI / alcohol / living-situation) — proto-piercing-prompts directed at self
  • 2023-04-21 — 2023 04 21 relaxed drunkening calmness / 2023 04 21 thoughts about tattoo
  • 2023-07-05 — 2023 07 05 cool questions — explicit collection
  • 2023-08-29 — 2023 08 29 thoughts and principle from dale carnegie — inherits from Dale Carnegie's "find what makes them feel important" heuristic
  • 2024-09-28 — 2024 09 28 thoughts — practice continuing into China year
  • 2025-04-07 — 2025 04 07 piercing prompts — the practice gets a name
  • 2026-03-13 — 2026 03 13 how are they approaching true ai result accuracy — commercial application: the API-vs-scraping diligence cut for Rankett competitor recon

The pattern

Three uses surface across the corpus:

  1. Social — surface character in dating / friendship / new-acquaintance contexts
  2. Self-direction — force opinion-formation on deferred topics (2023 03 29 plans for spring break)
  3. Commercial diligence — separate serious operators from dashboard-builders in Rankett competitor recon

The arc is: weird-fun → deliberate-self-tool → professional-weapon. Same primitive across all three — the question that the other person can't have pre-cached an answer to.

Source summaries

  • 2025 04 07 piercing prompts — the named version
  • 2022 04 16 what are must have seasoning no salt or pepper — earliest unnamed instance
  • 2023 07 05 cool questions — collection
  • 2023 08 29 thoughts and principle from dale carnegie — Carnegie ancestry
  • 2026 03 13 how are they approaching true ai result accuracy — commercial use
  • 2023 02 01 pre determined stances
  • 2024 09 28 thoughts
  • 2019 08 06 read books wireless charging brain waves

Connections

asking the right question · dale carnegie · rankett · ai visibility engine · lineage as fate
